headline: How Keysight’s New Cybersecurity and Auto Network Tests At Keysight Technologies (KEYS) Has Changed Its Investment Story
summary: In April 2026, Keysight Technologies launched its SBOM Manager platform and new high-speed automotive receiver compliance test solutions, expanding its cybersecurity and in-vehicle network testing capabilities in response to tightening global regulations such as the EU Cyber Resilience Act. By unifying SBOM management, continuous vulnerability intelligence, and advanced automotive Ethernet testing, Keysight is positioning its test and measurement portfolio at the center of regulatory...
